mull
  • Home

  • Contact

Contact

Where to ask, report, and contribute.

Issues and bugs

The fastest way to report a problem or request a feature is the issue tracker. Include your platform, Mull version, and what you ran.

mull --version
github.com/palmshed/mull/issues

Source and pull requests

Mull is developed in the open. Pull requests, documentation fixes, and discussion are welcome.

github.com/palmshed/mull

Security

For vulnerabilities, please follow the project's coordinated disclosure process rather than opening a public issue. See the repository's security policy.

Everything else

For trademark, partnership, or other questions, open a discussion or issue and the maintainers will respond.

Thanks for using Mull.
